name: Tomago BESS
notable: 500 MW / 2 GWh grid-scale battery at former Tomago aluminium smelter site. AGL Energy flagship storage project in the Hunter Valley, NSW.

timeline.title: EPBC Referral 2023/09521
timeline.detail: Tomago Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) — Completed

timeline.title: Final Investment Decision
timeline.detail: AGL reaches FID on 500MW/2000MWh Tomago BESS. AUD 800M capex. Fluence Gridstack Pro technology.

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Construction begins at Tomago Industrial Estate. Up to 200 construction jobs.

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2027-10 to 2027-10-31 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

timeline.title: Expected COD H2 2027
timeline.detail: Expected to enter operation in second half of 2027. 20-year design life.

eis_specs.document_title: Tomago Battery Energy Storage System — SSD EIS (NSW)
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~3.5 km of new 330 kV cable/line from project to Tomago TransGrid substation; EIS Section 9
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV feeder bay at Tomago substation required. Short connection distance and existing high-capacity substation minimise augmentation cost. NSCAS agreement with TransGrid.
eis_specs.notes: 500 MW / 2,000 MWh (4-hour) BESS located at the former Tomago Aluminium substation precinct, Hunter Valley NSW. AGL Energy project. NSW State Significant Development. Grid-forming capability required by EIS and Network Support and Control Ancillary Service (NSCAS) agreement with TransGrid. Connection to 330 kV Hunter Valley transmission network.
